rationale.R1.3: Fails to identify the major contradiction between the reported numbers and the conclusion.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident despite clear contradictions and unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope but misses several key methodological details and lacks a proper comparison of the 4-role variant with a matched-compute baseline.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., potentially misleading conclusions).
